source: Creator Monetize — SFC Scripting + Tier 3 Body Script + Video Framing + Content Types

steps.name: Video Framing
steps.description: Take raw idea and give it direction

steps.name: Packaging Framing
steps.description: Take idea and turn it into a title

steps.name: Directional Framing
steps.description: Give specific direction for a specific audience

steps.name: Identifying Grand Payoff
steps.description: Define the overarching question the viewer must stay to answer

fields.description: What will the viewer become/achieve after watching?
What happens if they don't watch/act?
What might stop them from believing or engaging?

static.name: Static Content
static.description: Teaches how to think, see, and decide. Evergreen, based on principles.

dynamic.name: Dynamic Content
dynamic.description: Teaches how to do, act, and execute. Changes over time, step-by-step.

lesson_titling.rule: Static lessons get creative/intriguing titles. Dynamic lessons get straightforward/literal titles.

phase_1.name: Brainstorm
phase_1.description: Dump everything in excruciating detail. Get all thoughts out without structure.

phase_2.name: Script
phase_2.description: Use Typical Sequence or Tier template to organize the brainstorm into a structured script.

typical_sequence.name: Typical Sequence (for course/lesson videos)
structure: The Big Hook (what video is about, create excitement)
Provide Value (sequential points with structure, not rambles)
Dynamic Content: Action Steps (VERY IMPORTANT — if dynamic content)

signature_lines.closing: That's it for today's lesson, I'll see you in the next one

principles.name: Quality
principles.description: Product quality is upstream of content quality

principles.name: Detail
principles.description: Go deep, cover all ground, holistic understanding

principles.name: Simplicity
principles.description: Clean and lean, only add detail if it makes sense

principles.name: Teaching Children
principles.description: Imagine clients have zero understanding, assume nothing

1.name: Tier 1 — Simple
1.description: Linear flow: Hook → 3 value points → CTA. Best for short-form (60s).
1.guidance: Each point delivers one clear takeaway. No nested tension.

2.name: Tier 2 — Setup/Stress/Payoff
2.description: Hook → 5 points, each with Setup/Stress/Payoff tension loops → CTA. Setup introduces, Stress builds stakes, Payoff resolves and transitions.
2.guidance: P1 is typically personal story (credibility). P2-P5 are value steps. Each Payoff is a short transition sentence that rewards viewer and opens next loop.

3.name: Tier 3 — Fully Written
3.structure: Same as Tier 2 but fully written out with complete dialogue
3.description: Tier 2 structure with every word scripted. Full sentences, transitions, and dialogue written out — nothing left to improvise.
3.guidance: Use for high-stakes videos, ads, or presentations where every word matters.

viral.name: Viral Video Template
viral.description: Start with what's wrong → offer alternatives → promise outcome → deliver solutions → CTA

pitch.name: Perfect Video Pitch Template
pitch.description: Identify problem → show opportunity → give steps → promise transformation

false_statement.name: False Statement Template
false_statement.description: Make a bold false claim → reveal the truth → back with proof → CTA
